cabi-net
work writing syllabus about send a postcard ↗

rider-waite recoloured

2026 scraping / image processing / automation github ↗

A Python script that scrapes all 78 Rider-Waite Tarot card images from Wikimedia Commons and recolours every card using a custom 4-anchor LAB ramp palette — inspired by Krita's Index Colors filter, reimplemented from scratch in Python and applied entirely at runtime.

The palette is built from four ordered anchors — Shadow, Base, Light, Bright — whose colours and number of intermediate steps the user defines. The script linearly interpolates between each adjacent pair in CIE LAB space, then snaps every pixel to its nearest palette entry by Euclidean LAB distance. Output directories and palette swatches are auto-named from the settings, so every run is reproducible and self-documenting.

terminal

$ python rider_waite_krita_index.py \
--shadow 3f32ac --base 76428a --light 5fcde4 --bright ffffff \
--steps 4 4 4

anchor colours

generated palette

recoloured cards

The generated cards are used in an oracle tarot reader — interactive embed forthcoming.
